old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.1.8","title":"Reject relayed link-local DAO origins","description":"At roots, allow link-local DAO origin only when immediate authenticated sender matches the origin and the advertised parent is root. new_value: Restricted signed link-local DAO origins to direct authenticated origin IID with exact parent=root after replay classification and before mutation. Added malicious relay non-mutation/direct retry test; external vectors pass.
